From Wikipedia, the free encyclopedia

A **[video game developer](/wiki/Video_game_developer "Video game developer")** is an individual or company working on video game production.

**Game developer** may also refer to:

* [*Game Developer* (magazine)](/wiki/Game_Developer_(magazine) "Game Developer (magazine)"), a defunct monthly trade periodical for the video game industry
* [*Game Developer* (website)](/wiki/Game_Developer_(website) "Game Developer (website)"), formerly *Gamasutra*, the ongoing sister publication to the magazine of the same name
* [Video game publisher](/wiki/Video_game_publisher "Video game publisher"), a company that develops video games
* [Game designer](/wiki/Game_designer "Game designer"), a member of game development team, responsible for game's design
* [Game programmer](/wiki/Game_programmer "Game programmer"), a member of game development team, responsible for game's codebase
